surfaces.copy: My RIASEC result points to work activities that may be worth exploring first. The share version shows only a safe summary and does not expose raw feedback or private context.
The share page is not a full report and does not state a career conclusion. It summarizes the interest pattern and the method boundaries for this result.
A personal PDF can preserve the full result, generation time, and method boundaries. Once a PDF is forwarded, the platform cannot remotely recall it.
A counselor discussion version may show more exploration summary with user permission. It must not be used for screening, admission, promotion, elimination, or qualification decisions.
History for the same form should emphasize Top 3 overlap, near ties, and reading strength. It should not draw cross-form raw score movement.
60Q and 140Q use different score spaces. History can explain which interest clues were emphasized in each result, but it must not chart raw score gains or drops across forms.
A cautious-reading result allows only a safe share summary by default and does not show a strong activity chain or occupation-context examples.

v5_editorial_note: English share/PDF/history lifecycle draft keeps RIASEC as an interest-signal assessment and requires human review before broad content expansion.
